introSection: Capitol Bullet Train is a steel launched roller coaster operating at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The roller coaster was not completed in time for the park's opening on 16 December 2016. The ride was launched at an official ceremony on 20 October 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This coaster is part of the Lionsgate zone at Motiongate. It is themed around the train linking the districts to the Capitol from the Hunger Games trilogy. The ride is a semi-shuttle roller coaster from Mack Rides, similar to Star Trek: Operation Enterprise at Movie Park Germany.

fullText:
Capitol Bullet Train is a steel launched roller coaster operating at Motiongate in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The roller coaster was not completed in time for the park's opening on 16 December 2016. The ride was launched at an official ceremony on 20 October 2017.

This coaster is part of the Lionsgate zone at Motiongate. It is themed around the train linking the districts to the Capitol from the Hunger Games trilogy. The ride is a semi-shuttle roller coaster from Mack Rides, similar to Star Trek: Operation Enterprise at Movie Park Germany.
